name: tibco-vectordb-rag-query
title: RAG Query
description: Full RAG pipeline: embed query text → vector search → format context for LLM. Combines embedding generation and semantic retrieval in one activity.

display.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation: embed → search → format context

display.name: VectorDB Connection
display.description: Select the VectorDB connector to use for retrieval

display.name: Use Connector Embedding Settings
display.description: Inherit the embedding provider, API key, and base URL from the VectorDB connection. Only the model needs to be set below. Requires 'Configure Embedding Provider' to be enabled on the connection.

display.name: Embedding Provider
display.description: API provider used to embed the query text. Leave blank when 'Use Connector Embedding Settings' is enabled.

display.name: Embedding API Key
display.description: API key for the embedding provider. Not required for Ollama.

display.name: Embedding Base URL
display.description: Override the default provider URL. Azure: full deployment URL. Ollama: http://localhost:11434. Custom: your endpoint.

display.name: Embedding Model
display.description: Embedding model used to encode the query. Must match the model used during document ingestion.

display.name: Embedding Dimensions
display.description: Output dimensions (0 = model default). Must match the collection's vector dimension.

display.name: Default Collection
display.description: Fallback collection name when not provided in the activity input

display.name: Default Top-K
display.description: Default number of documents to retrieve

display.name: Score Threshold
display.description: Minimum similarity score (0.0 = no filter). Documents below this threshold are excluded.

display.name: Content Field
display.description: Payload field name containing the document text. Used when building formattedContext.

display.name: Context Format
display.description: Format of formattedContext output: numbered (1. text), markdown (**[1]** text), xml (<document>), plain (raw text), json (JSON array with index/id/score/content/payload)

display.name: Timeout (s)
display.description: Total timeout covering embedding API + vector search

display.name: Use Hybrid Search
display.description: Enable hybrid (BM25 + dense vector) search. Only Weaviate supports native hybrid; other providers fall back to dense vector search.

display.name: Hybrid Alpha
display.description: Blend weight for hybrid search: 0.0 = pure BM25 keyword, 1.0 = pure dense vector, 0.5 = balanced (default). Only used when useHybridSearch is true.

input.name: filters
input.schema: {"type": "object", "description": "Key-value filter map. Keys are payload field names. Values can be string, number, boolean, or array (for 'in' match). Example: {\"category\":\"tech\",\"year\":2024,\"tags\":[\"rag\",\"llm\"]}", "additionalProperties": true}
